LIKELY A MICROBURST RESULTED IN A ROOF COLLAPSE OF THE BADCOCK FURNITURE STORE IN HAMPTON. THE FIVE PEOPLE THAT WERE INSIDE WERE PULLED FROM THE BUILDING AND NO ONE WAS INJURED. AN ADJACENT BUSINESS HAD THE ROOF LIFTED UP AND THE WINDOWS WERE BLOWN OUT. IN THE NEARBY FOOD LION SOME CEILING TILES WERE BLOWN OUT OF THE BUILDING. ALSO SEVERAL TREES WERE KNOCKED DOWN IN AND AROUND TOWN.
